context: Tests whether the agent builds a Grafana commerce dashboard with the required panel types and correct PromQL queries, including both business and technical KPI panels as prescribed by the skill.

checklist.name: Checkout funnel panel
checklist.description: dashboard-notes.md or dashboard JSON includes a checkout funnel panel (described as Sankey, bar chart, or funnel visualization showing cart-to-confirmation drop-off)

checklist.name: Payment success rate gauge
checklist.description: dashboard-notes.md or dashboard JSON includes a payment success rate panel using a gauge visualization (not time series or stat)

checklist.name: Revenue per hour panel
checklist.description: dashboard-notes.md or dashboard JSON includes a revenue per hour panel using a time series visualization

checklist.name: Decline code pie chart
checklist.description: dashboard-notes.md or dashboard JSON includes a payment failures by decline code panel using a pie chart visualization

checklist.name: Latency time series panel
checklist.description: dashboard-notes.md or dashboard JSON includes an order creation latency panel showing P50/P95/P99 as a time series

checklist.name: Abandonment rate stat panel
checklist.description: dashboard-notes.md or dashboard JSON includes a checkout abandonment rate panel using a stat panel visualization

checklist.name: Active carts gauge
checklist.description: dashboard-notes.md or dashboard JSON includes an active carts panel using a gauge visualization

checklist.name: Out of stock counter
checklist.description: dashboard-notes.md or dashboard JSON includes an out of stock events panel

checklist.name: Payment success rate PromQL
checklist.description: dashboard-notes.md or dashboard JSON uses a PromQL query dividing rate(payment_successes_total[...]) by (rate(payment_successes_total[...]) + rate(payment_failures_total[...])) for the payment success rate panel

checklist.name: P99 latency PromQL
checklist.description: dashboard-notes.md or dashboard JSON uses histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(order_creation_duration_ms_bucket[...])) by (le, ...)) for the latency panel

checklist.name: Checkout conversion PromQL
checklist.description: dashboard-notes.md or dashboard JSON uses rate(checkout_completed_total[1h]) / rate(checkout_started_total[1h]) (with 1h window) for the checkout conversion panel

checklist.name: Decline code topk PromQL
checklist.description: dashboard-notes.md or dashboard JSON uses topk(5, sum(rate(payment_failures_total[...])) by (decline_code)) for the decline code panel

checklist.name: Business metric included
checklist.description: dashboard-notes.md or dashboard JSON includes at least one business metric panel (orders per minute OR revenue per hour) alongside the technical SLO panels
